name: Spicy Chocolate Tart
recipeInstructions:
For the dough: Place flour in a mixing bowl and sift cocoa powder over it. Stir in the sugar, salt, and baking powder. Rub the butter finely into the dry ingredients until the mixture is cool and powdery. Beat the egg and stir it into the dough. Form the dough into a disk, wrap it, and chill it.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Set rack in the lower third of the oven.
On a floured surface, roll out the dough and line a buttered 10-inch tart pan. Set aside while preparing filling.
In a saucepan over medium heat, bring sugar and water to a boil. Add butter and continue heating until the butter melts. Off the heat, whisk in finely chopped chocolate. Whisk eggs with cinnamon and cloves, then whisk in the chocolate mixture. Pour into the tart shell.
Bake for about 30 minutes, until well risen and firm. Cool on a rack. Unmold tart and serve with sweetened whipped cream.
